function 2

query:
WITH expanded_devices AS (
    SELECT 
        d.id,
        d.name,
        d.slave_id,
        TRIM(val) AS device_number
    FROM rfir_devices d,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(d.name, '^AC\s*', ''), '\s+')) AS val
    WHERE d.type = 'ir'
)
SELECT 
    ed.id AS device_id,
    ed.name AS device_name,
    ed.slave_id AS rfir_slave_id,
    s_infra.id AS infrared_id,
    s_infra.name AS infrared_name,
    s_energy.id AS energy_id,
    s_energy.name AS energy_name,
    ed.device_number,
    b.id AS button_id,
    b.name AS button_name,
    b.rfir_command_id AS command_id,
    b.rfir_remote_id AS remote_id
FROM expanded_devices ed
LEFT JOIN slaves s_infra 
    ON s_infra.type = 'infrared' 
    AND s_infra.name ~ ('RM.*' || ed.device_number || '\y')
LEFT JOIN slaves s_energy 
    ON s_energy.type = 'three_phase_sensor' 
    AND s_energy.name ~ ('3F.*' || ed.device_number || '\y')
LEFT JOIN rfir_buttons b
    ON b.rfir_remote_id = ed.id
ORDER BY ed.device_number::int, ed.id, b.id;

query:
SELECT 
    d.id AS device_id,
    d.name AS device_name,
    d.slave_id AS rfir_slave_id,
    s_infra.id AS infrared_id,
    s_infra.name AS infrared_name,
    s_energy.id AS energy_id,
    s_energy.name AS energy_name,
    TRIM(UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(s_energy.name, '^3F\s*', ''), '/'))) AS device_number,
    b.id AS button_id,
    b.name AS button_name,
    b.rfir_command_id AS command_id,
    b.rfir_remote_id AS remote_id
FROM rfir_devices d
LEFT JOIN slaves s_infra 
    ON s_infra.type = 'infrared' 
    AND s_infra.name ~ ('RM.*' || REGEXP_REPLACE(d.name, '^AC\s*', '') || '\y')
LEFT JOIN slaves s_energy 
    ON s_energy.type = 'three_phase_sensor' 
    AND s_energy.name ~ ('3F.*' || REGEXP_REPLACE(d.name, '^AC\s*', '') || '\y')
LEFT JOIN rfir_buttons b
    ON b.rfir_remote_id = d.id
WHERE d.type = 'ir'
ORDER BY device_number, d.id, b.id;

SELECT 
    b.id AS button_id,
    b.name AS button_name,
    b.rfir_command_id AS command_id,
    b.rfir_remote_id AS remote_id,
    d.slave_id AS slave_id,
    d.id AS device_id
FROM rfir_buttons b
JOIN rfir_devices d
    ON d.id = b.rfir_remote_id
WHERE d.type = 'ir'
ORDER BY b.rfir_remote_id, b.id;

query:
WITH expanded_sensors AS (
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.name,
        TRIM(val) AS device_number
    FROM slaves s,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(s.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val
    WHERE s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
      AND TRIM(val) ~ '^\d+$'
),
expanded_devices AS (
    SELECT 
        d.id,
        d.name,
        d.slave_id,
        TRIM(val) AS device_number
    FROM rfir_devices d,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(d.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val
    WHERE d.type = 'ir'
      AND TRIM(val) ~ '^\d+$'
),
expanded_infrared AS (
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.name,
        TRIM(val) AS device_number
    FROM slaves s,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(s.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val
    WHERE s.type = 'infrared'
      AND TRIM(val) ~ '^\d+$'
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(ed.id, NULL) AS device_id,
    COALESCE(ed.name, NULL) AS device_name,
    COALESCE(ed.slave_id, NULL) AS rfir_slave_id,
    ei.id AS infrared_id,
    ei.name AS infrared_name,
    es.id AS energy_id,
    es.name AS energy_name,
    es.device_number
FROM expanded_sensors es
LEFT JOIN expanded_devices ed 
    ON ed.device_number = es.device_number
LEFT JOIN expanded_infrared ei 
    ON ei.device_number = es.device_number
ORDER BY es.device_number::int, es.id;

WITH expanded_sensors AS (
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.name,
        TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(
            CASE 
                WHEN part_idx = 1 THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(part, '^[^0-9]*[0-9]*[^0-9]+', '', 'g') -- Remove prefix (e.g., '3F 3 ' or '3F ') for first part
                ELSE part
            END, 
            '[^0-9]+', '', 'g'
        )) AS device_number
    FROM slaves s,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(s.name, '/')) WITH ORDINALITY AS part(part, part_idx)
    WHERE s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
      AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(
            CASE 
                WHEN part_idx = 1 THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(part, '^[^0-9]*[0-9]*[^0-9]+', '', 'g')
                ELSE part
            END, 
            '[^0-9]+', '', 'g'
        )) ~ '^\d+$'
),
expanded_devices AS (
    SELECT 
        d.id,
        d.name,
        d.slave_id,
        TRIM(val) AS device_number
    FROM rfir_devices d,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(d.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val
    WHERE d.type = 'ir'
      AND TRIM(val) ~ '^\d+$'
),
expanded_infrared AS (
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.name,
        TRIM(val) AS device_number
    FROM slaves s,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(s.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val
    WHERE s.type = 'infrared'
      AND TRIM(val) ~ '^\d+$'
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(ed.id, NULL) AS device_id,
    COALESCE(ed.name, NULL) AS device_name,
    COALESCE(ed.slave_id, NULL) AS rfir_slave_id,
    ei.id AS infrared_id,
    ei.name AS infrared_name,
    es.id AS energy_id,
    es.name AS energy_name,
    es.device_number
FROM expanded_sensors es
LEFT JOIN expanded_devices ed 
    ON ed.device_number = es.device_number
LEFT JOIN expanded_infrared ei 
    ON ei.device_number = es.device_number
ORDER BY es.device_number::int, es.id;

        s.id,

),
expanded_devices AS (

    FROM rfir_devices d,
         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(d.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val
    WHERE d.type = 'ir'
      AND TRIM(val) ~ '^\d+$'
),
expanded_infrared AS (
    SELECT

         UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REGEXP_REPLACE(s.name, '[^0-9]+', ' ', 'g'), ' ')) AS val

)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(ed.id, NULL) AS device_id,

rules.to: (	$pres:= ['1','3','5','6','7','10','12','19','20','21','22','24','25','27','32','33','34'];			$each(devices, function($v,$k){	    {	        $k:	            {	                "consumo": $v.consumo,	                "pres": $reduce($pres, function($acc,$va){	                    $acc or (	                        $k = $va	                    )	                },false) ?	                    $reduce(payload, function($acc,$va){	                        $contains($uppercase($va.name), 'SW') and $substringAfter($uppercase($va.name), 'SW ') = $k ?	                                {	                                    "id": $va.id,	                                    "name": $va.name,	                                    "type": $va.type	                                }	                            :	                                $contains($uppercase($va.name), 'RM') and $substringAfter($uppercase($va.name), 'RM ') = $k and $acc = false?	                                    {	                                        "id": $va.id,	                                        "name": $va.name,	                                        "type": $va.type	                                    }	                                :	                                    $acc	                    },false)	            }	    }	})~>$merge()		)

$type(pres) = "object" ?	    $merge([pres,	    (	    $aux:=($lookup(pres, payload.device));	        $type($aux) = "object" ?	            payload.value = $aux.value ?	                {}	            :	                {	                    payload.device:{	                        "value": payload.value,	                        "time": $millis()	                    }	                }	    :	     	        {	            payload.device:{	                "value": payload.value,	                "time": $millis()	            }	        }	    )	    ])	:	    {	        payload.device:{	            "value": payload.value,	            "time": $millis()	        }	    }

$each(config, function($v,$k){	(	    $pres:= $lookup(pres,$k);	    $consumo:= $lookup(consumo,$k);	    	    $type($pres.time) = "number" and	    $millis() - $pres.time < 180000000?	    (	        $v.presenceDetection.enabled = true and	        $pres.value = true and 	        $consumo = false and	        $type($v.presenceDetection.triggerAfterSeconds) ="number"?	            ($v.presenceDetection.triggerAfterSeconds < 60000 ?	                $merge([	                {	                    $k: $merge([$v.presenceDetection.command,$pres])	                },	                    $map($v.extraDevicesToAct, function($va){	                        $type($va.presenceCommand) = "object" ?	                        {	                            $k&"_"&$va.presenceCommand.slaveId:$va.presenceCommand	                        }	                    })	                ])	            )    	            	        :	        	        $v.noPresenceDetection.enabled = true and	        $pres.value = false and	            $type($v.noPresenceDetection.triggerAfterSeconds) ="number" ?	                ($millis() - $pres.time > $v.noPresenceDetection.triggerAfterSeconds*1000) and	                $v.noPresenceDetection.triggerAfterSeconds < 60000?	                    $merge([	                    {	                        $k: $merge([$v.noPresenceDetection.command,$lookup(pres, $k)])	                    },	                        $map($v.extraDevicesToAct, function($va){	                            $type($va.noPresenceCommand) = "object" ?	                            {	                                $k&"_"&$va.noPresenceCommand.slaveId:$va.noPresenceCommand	                            }	                        })	                    ])	    )	)    	})~>$merge()

(	$qtd:= $lookup(sent,payload.current);	$last:= $lookup(last, payload.current);	    	    (	        (	            $contains($lowercase(payload.name),"deslig") or $contains($lowercase(payload.name),"off")	        ) 	        or	        (	            $lookup(pres, payload.current).value and $lookup(consumo, payload.current)	        )	    )	    and	        (	            $type($last) = "number"?	                $millis()-$last > 1800000	            :	                true	        )	    	    	)

$each(config, function($v,$k){	    $reduce($v, function($acc,$va){	        $merge([$acc,	        $va.holiday or (holiday = false) ?	            $lookup($va.daysWeek, time.day) ?	                $va.time = time.time?	                    {	                        $k&"_"&$va.command_id:{	                            "slaveId": $va.slave_id,	                            "commandId": $va.command_id,	                            "current":$k,	                            "command": $reduce(payload, function($accb,$vb){	                                $va.command_id = $vb.rfir_command_id ?	                                    $vb.name	                                :	                                    $accb	                            },1)	                        }	                    }	        ])	    },{})	})~>$merge()

query:
SELECT rfir_command_id,name FROM rfir_buttons
where rfir_command_id = 16

SELECT "timestamp", rfir_command_id, slave_id, "user" FROM logs
 WHERE timestamp > '2025-11-25 00:00:00'
   AND timestamp < '2025-11-25 23:59:59'
   AND rfir_command_id = 469
ORDER BY timestamp DESC;

SELECT rfir_command_id FROM logs
 WHERE timestamp > '2025-11-25 00:00:00'
   AND timestamp < '2025-11-25 23:59:59'
   AND slave_id = 52
ORDER BY timestamp DESC;
